arts.ttl: Amanda Staveley sets deadline to complete investment in Newcastle's rivals Tottenham
arts.sum: After a painful departure from Newcastle, Amanda Staveley and Mehrdad Ghodoussi – guests of Spurs at last weekend’s visit of Brentford – are in advanced talks to buy a sizeable stake in the north London club

arts.ttl: No class, no energy, no progress - Manchester United response to Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United still have a lot to improve under Erik ten Hag but some supporters feel time is running out for the Dutch manager

arts.ttl: ‘Shaky start’: Pundit says ‘fantastic’ Tottenham player is starting to get better now
arts.sum: Tottenham haven’t had the best of starts in the Premier League this season. The north London club sit firmly in mid-table after winning just two...

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'in the race' for 20-year-old attacker
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly keen on AZ Alkmaar youngster Ruben van Bommel, who is the son of the legendary Mark van Bommel.

arts.ttl: History-making Manchester United wonderkid sends game-time message to Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Ethan Wheatley has not played a senior game since May but might have just grabbed the attention of Erik ten Hag after his hat-trick for the Under-21s.

arts.ttl: Man Utd insider reveals Ratcliffe's stance on SACKING Ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United bosses have 'no appetite for change,' but the pressure will pile on Erik ten Hag if poor results persist, according to The Athletic . At least that is according to The Athletic's Laurie Whitwell, who reports that Man Utd's new INEOS bosses would prefer not having to make a change this early in the season.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag predicting open game as Man Utd and Spurs look to kickstart seasons
arts.sum: The two clubs have both picked up seven points from their opening five games.
